/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock.so -o libgmock.so CMakeFiles/gmock.dir/gmock_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmock.dir/src/gmock-all.cc.o   -L/usr/lib/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu:/home/pi/catkin_ws/build_isolated/rviz/gtest/googlemock/gtest gtest/libgtest.so -pthread
